Class FinancialAndUsageTrackingImpl

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.boxoffice.FinancialAndUsageTrackingImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
FinancialAndUsageTracking
public class FinancialAndUsageTrackingImpl extends Object implements FinancialAndUsageTracking
Implementation of financial and usage tracking. Handles discounts for various categories (NHS, Military, Local Resident) and tracks revenue after discounts. Data stored: - revenues: Maps ticket sale ID to revenue amount - discountTypes: Maps ticket sale ID to type of discount applied - discountAmounts: Maps ticket sale ID to discount amount

  • Method Details

    • applyDiscount

      public void applyDiscount(String ticketSalesId, String discountType, double discountAmount)
      Applies a discount to a ticket sale
      Specified by:
      applyDiscount in interface FinancialAndUsageTracking
      Parameters:
      ticketSalesId - Unique identifier for the ticket sale
      discountType - Type of discount (e.g., Military, NHS, Local Resident)
      discountAmount - Amount to be discounted from the ticket price

    • getTicketRevenue

      public double getTicketRevenue(String ticketSalesId)
      Retrieves the current revenue for a ticket sale after any discounts
      Specified by:
      getTicketRevenue in interface FinancialAndUsageTracking
      Parameters:
      ticketSalesId - Unique identifier for the ticket sale
      Returns:
      Current revenue amount after discounts
